root_cause_assessment.most_likely_root_cause: Misconfigured dispatch URL pointing to a preliminary validation endpoint instead of the final processing webhook endpoint.
why: The configured dispatch URL is https://auditapatron.com/api/auditapatron/webhook which only validates document.uploaded and returns accepted without final processing.
Final processing and webhook event creation happen on different routes such as /api/auditapatron/complilink-webhook.
The runtime symptom shows HTTP 202 with correlationId but no final webhook events, indicating incomplete processing.
Historical test expects https://www.complilink.mx/api/auditapatron/webhook as the correct bridge endpoint, suggesting the current URL is outdated or incorrect.
Switching the dispatch URL to the historically expected and final processing endpoint will restore end-to-end processing.
Adding a compatibility fallback to the current URL can ensure backward compatibility during rollout.
This fix is minimal, safe, and aligns with user requirement for 100% reliable target behavior.

how_to_update_tests: Update the stale test to expect https://www.complilink.mx/api/auditapatron/webhook as the bridge endpoint.
Add or modify tests to verify that final webhook events are created and persisted asynchronously.
Ensure tests cover both the legacy and new URLs if compatibility fallback is implemented.

checks: Verify that dispatch requests are sent to https://www.complilink.mx/api/auditapatron/webhook.
Confirm that final webhook events are created and persisted after dispatch.
Check that HTTP 202 responses include correlationId and that subsequent processing completes successfully.
Run updated integration tests covering both URLs if fallback is enabled.
expected_success_signal: Final webhook events are present and correctly persisted.
No loss of asynchronous processing after dispatch.
All integration tests pass with updated URL configuration.

json.one_sentence_verdict: The dispatch URL must be corrected to the final processing endpoint https://www.complilink.mx/api/auditapatron/webhook with a compatibility fallback to restore full asynchronous webhook event processing reliably.

root_cause_assessment.most_likely_root_cause: The AUDITAPATRON_ENGINE_WEBHOOK_URL is misconfigured to point to an initial validation endpoint that returns HTTP 202 but does not trigger the downstream final processing and persistence of compliLinkWebhookEvents.
why: The 'current_target_behavior' explicitly states that the configured dispatch URL only validates and returns accepted, without performing final processing or creating compliLinkWebhookEvents.
The 'runtime_symptom' of dispatch returning HTTP 202 with correlationId but empty final webhook events directly corroborates the described behavior of the misconfigured endpoint.

The existence of 'final_return_handler_routes' and a 'historical_test_expectation' for a different URL (https://www.complilink.mx/api/auditapatron/webhook) strongly suggests that the correct final processing endpoint is distinct from the currently configured one.

Updating the configuration parameter 'AUDITAPATRON_ENGINE_WEBHOOK_URL' to the correct final processing endpoint (likely https://www.complilink.mx/api/auditapatron/webhook, as per historical tests) will directly address the root cause.
This change is minimal and safe, as it involves correcting an existing configuration rather than altering core logic, aligning with the 'must_be_minimal' and 'must_be_safe' constraints.
It will enable the system to dispatch to the endpoint responsible for creating compliLinkWebhookEvents, thereby restoring end-to-end processing and asynchronous persistence.
